prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild training yard, Kiri Emberlane (scout in cropped jacket and messenger straps) and Kiri Dawncrest (mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags). Emberlane holds a weathered map, pointing to a route, while Dawncrest leans in, focusing on the map with a serious expression, their shoulders brushing in a moment of tactical preparation, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot, Kiri Dawncrest gently touches a floating spell tag to the map, causing a soft blue arcane glow to trace the path, while Kiri Emberlane nods in agreement, adjusting her gear and checking her compass, both characters preparing for the upcoming expedition, no text, no watermark.
